findings.description:
File carries 85 bytes after the final %%EOF marker at offset 1457. PDF specification places %%EOF at the end of a valid file; bytes beyond the final marker are structurally orphan and not part of the rendered document. First 64 bytes (Latin-1 repr): '

%% bayyinah-test-trailer
HIDDEN_TEXT_PAYLOAD: actual revenue $'.

inversion_recovery.surface: file size 1547 bytes; final %%EOF at offset 1457
